send_mail.title: Īmēra Tono ā-Ringa
send_mail.subject: Tukuna ngā īmēra tono mō ngā ota kāore i tukuna aunoa

empty_search.title: Kāore he ota i kitea
empty_search.description: Whakarerekē i ngā whiriwhiringa, whakapātaitia te kupu rapu

banner.title: Whiwhi mahi
banner.content: Ki te whakamahi i tēnei āhuatanga, me whakaaetia koe ki te whakapau kōrero 'whakamahinga ota' anō ki TrustShop. Ki te whakaaetia te whakapau kōrero, tīmata i te pātene i raro nei
